column1: # OTGW-firmware ESP32-S3 partition table — single app (no OTA)
# The full ESP32-S3 build (WiFi + Ethernet + OTDirect) exceeds 2MB
# OTA with two app partitions does not fit in 4MB flash. To enable OTA a
# board with 8MB flash is required (use a custom 8MB partition table then).
# Bootloader: 0x0 (ESP32-S3 specific — differs from original ESP32 which uses 0x1000)
